title: CBRE's Board Appoints CEO Robert Sulentic as Board Chair
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE:CBRE) today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Chief Executive Officer Robert Sulentic to the additional role of Chair of the Board of Directors, effective immediately. Mr. Sulentic, who has served as President and CEO of CBRE since December 2012, succeeds Brandon Boze, who has served as Chair since May 2018 and will remain on the Board. Shira Goodman, former Chief Executive Officer of Staples, Inc. and a Director since May 2019,.

title: MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (NYSE: MEGI) Declares Monthly Distribution for November 2023 and Availability of 19(a) Notice
text: NEW YORK , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MainStay CBRE Global Infrastructure Megatrends Term Fund (the "Fund") (NYSE: MEGI) today announced the Fund's monthly distributions for November 2023 of $0.1250 per common share. The Fund's current annualized distribution rate is 12.88% based upon the closing price of $11.65 on November 10, 2023, and 10.96% based upon the Fund's closing NAV of $13.68 as of the same date.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for November 2nd
text: EADSY, AMTB and CBRE have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on November 2, 2023.
